message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-cancel-cleanup-progress): pin CancelReason + CleanupBehavior + ProgressUnit wire format + label contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-68f11)

22 tests complementing host_cancellation_controller_conformance and
host_progress_controller_conformance — those covered flow tests but
neither exhaustively pinned the FULL variant matrix or label() →
serde-tag invariance.

- CancelReason 6 internally-tagged variants: user_requested,
  agent_abort{reason}, timeout_approaching{remaining_ms},
  resource_limit{resource,current,limit}, superseded{by_operation_id},
  session_closing
- CancelReason::label MUST match serde 'type' tag for every variant
  (operator log greps depend on this invariant)
- CancelReason rejects unknown type tags + full roundtrip identity
- CleanupBehavior::default = BestEffort (documented sane default)
- CleanupBehavior 4 internally-tagged variants: best_effort, full
  {timeout_ms}, abandon, checkpoint; rejects unknown tags + roundtrip
- ProgressUnit 5 variants: 4 fixed (bytes/items/requests/rows
  serializing as bare strings) + Custom(String) payload
- ProgressUnit::label returns snake_case for fixed + inner String
  for Custom
- PartialEq compares variant AND Custom payload

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
